title: Social Services Program Educational Objectives
content:
Social Services Program Educational Objectives

1-Social Services will work in institutions at the level of the professional staff is to train technicians.

2-Social Services by transferring information with modern teaching methods at the national level can practice the profession competent to respond to the needs of the sector, equipped with every aspect "of Social Service Technician" is to educate.

3-Field of application of theoretical knowledge as well as learning opportunities to students who meet with the opportunity to work actively in the process industries provid.
